Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Total protein and globulin are low, possibly indicating nutritional deficiency or protein loss. Liver enzymes show mildly elevated ALT and low AST, with normal bilirubin and alkaline phosphatase. Lipid profile reveals hypercholesterolemia, high LDL, and elevated triglycerides, increasing cardiovascular risk. Further clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.
